agents.reliability_review: Accepted. The report inspected the current static web surface and gave file/line grounded PASS/BENIGN findings.
Partially accepted. The report contained useful boundary checks but also referenced prior account-detail contour artifacts, so local verification and static scans supersede it for the global verdict.

independent_findings.finding: Expected static screens are present in index.html, including the non-navigation import-existing route.
No active browser file picker, editable path, token input, secret input, raw JSON editor, or direct config editor was found on audited UI surfaces.
About/License/Version does not claim production, release, package, desktop readiness, or canonical version proof.
Preview-only source/state selects exist in the sidebar footer and are not runtime/config mutation controls.
Tests include synthetic private paths and forbidden claim strings as negative assertions; these are not UI leaks.
The non-navigation import-existing route exceeds the 1600x1000 main viewport and must not be enabled without a dedicated import/admission contour.
